query:
SELECT id, claim_id, estimated_cost, damage_description, detected_damage_types,
       confidence_score, fraud_indicators, fraud_risk_level, fraud_score_breakdown_json,
       total_loss_indicated, structural_damage_severity, estimated_vehicle_value,
       repair_to_value_ratio, total_loss_reasoning, damaged_components_json,
       physics_analysis, created_at
FROM ai_assessments
WHERE claim_id = 2730001
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute 
SELECT id, claim_id, estimated_cost, damage_description, detected_damage_types,
       confidence_score, fraud_indicators, fraud_risk_level, fraud_score_breakdown_json,
       total_loss_indicated, structural_damage_severity, estimated_vehicle_value,
       repair_to_value_ratio, total_loss_reasoning, damaged_components_json,
       physics_analysis, created_at
FROM ai_assessments
WHERE claim_id = 2730001
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

rows.damage_description: Isuzu D Teq (2013). Vehicle sustained damages on the RHS Tail Lamp, Rear Bumper, Rear Bumper Sensors, Front Bumper Slides, Grille, Diff Connectors, Front Bumper, Tow Hinge, Tail Gate, RHS Loading Panel, Radiator Support Panel and Rear End Piece. Excluded Tail Gate Locks and Inner Front Bumper Frame as not accident related.. 12 damaged components identified.
rows.fraud_indicators: ["No damage photographs provided with the claim."]
rows.fraud_score_breakdown_json: {"overallScore":15,"level":"minimal","indicators":[{"indicator":"no_damage_photos","category":"documentation","score":15,"description":"No damage photographs provided with the claim."}],"damageConsistency":{"score":50,"notes":"Damage patterns are consistent with reported incident."}}
